Aaron Hickey.note: Scotland's flexible full-back, useful on either side for recovery runs, underlaps, and carrying pressure into midfield.
Aaron Hickey.noteZh: 阿伦·希基是苏格兰灵活的边后卫，左右两侧都能回追、内切套跑，并把压力带入中场。

Andy Robertson.note: Scotland's captain and left-side engine, giving them crossing volume, recovery runs, and emotional control in tense stretches.
Andy Robertson.noteZh: 安迪·罗伯逊是苏格兰队长和左路发动机，能提供大量传中、回追跑动，以及紧张阶段的情绪控制。

Angus Gunn.summary: Angus Gunn is a Scotland goalkeeper who most recently played for Nottingham Forest and has been Scotland's first-choice keeper during the 2026 World Cup.
Angus Gunn.note: Scotland's first-choice goalkeeper, giving them shot-stopping, clear defensive calls, and calm restarts after saves.
Angus Gunn.noteZh: 安格斯·冈恩是苏格兰一号门将，能提供扑救、清晰的防线指挥，以及扑救后的冷静重新开球。

Anthony Ralston.note: Scotland's rugged right-back, useful for back-post defending, close-range duels, and adding edge on set pieces.
Anthony Ralston.noteZh: 安东尼·拉尔斯顿是苏格兰硬朗右后卫，能防守后点、完成近距离对抗，并在定位球中增加强度。

Ben Gannon-Doak.note: Scotland's fearless young winger, giving them right-side acceleration, one-on-one dribbling, and direct carries that unsettle defenders.
Ben Gannon-Doak.noteZh: 本·甘农-多克是苏格兰无畏的年轻边锋，能在右路加速、一对一带球，并用直接推进扰乱后卫。

Che Adams.note: Scotland's mobile forward, useful for running channels, linking attacks quickly, and pressing centre-backs before they settle.
Che Adams.noteZh: 切·亚当斯是苏格兰机动型前锋，能冲击肋部通道、快速衔接进攻，并在中卫站稳前完成压迫。

Craig Gordon.note: Scotland's veteran goalkeeper, giving the squad reflex saves, box command, and experience if the game turns chaotic.
Craig Gordon.noteZh: 克雷格·戈登是苏格兰老将门将，能在比赛变乱时提供反应扑救、禁区指挥和经验。

Dominic Hyam.note: Scotland's steady centre-back option, useful for aerial defending, compact positioning, and clearing pressure without panic.
Dominic Hyam.noteZh: 多米尼克·海亚姆是苏格兰稳健的中卫选择，能完成空中防守、保持紧凑站位，并冷静解围压力。

Findlay Curtis.note: Scotland's emerging wide runner, giving them left-side energy, direct movement, and fresh pressing legs off the bench.
Findlay Curtis.noteZh: 芬德利·柯蒂斯是苏格兰新兴边路跑动点，能带来左路活力、直接前插，以及替补登场后的压迫体能。

George Hirst.note: Scotland's centre-forward target, useful for attacking crosses, occupying centre-backs, and finishing from crowded penalty areas.
George Hirst.noteZh: 乔治·赫斯特是苏格兰中锋支点，能冲击传中、牵制中卫，并在拥挤禁区中完成终结。

Grant Hanley.note: Scotland's experienced centre-back, giving them aerial power, deep-block organisation, and leadership when defending late pressure.
Grant Hanley.noteZh: 格兰特·汉利是苏格兰经验丰富的中卫，能提供空中力量、低位防守组织，以及抵挡比赛后段压力时的领导力。

Jack Hendry.note: Scotland's mobile centre-back, useful for recovery runs, passing through the first line, and defending set-piece traffic.
Jack Hendry.noteZh: 杰克·亨德里是苏格兰机动中卫，能回追补位、穿过第一道压力出球，并防守定位球混战。

John McGinn.note: Scotland's midfield driver, turning shoulder checks and ball shielding into forward carries and late runs into scoring areas.
John McGinn.noteZh: 约翰·麦金是苏格兰中场推进器，能用观察和护球转化为向前带球，并后插上进入得分区域。

John Souttar.note: Scotland's right-sided centre-back option, helping them win duels, find passing lanes, and defend the box cleanly.
John Souttar.noteZh: 约翰·苏塔尔是苏格兰右侧中卫选择，能赢下对抗、找到传球线路，并干净地防守禁区。

Kenny McLean.note: Scotland's experienced central midfielder, useful for left-footed circulation, game management, and keeping possession connected.
Kenny McLean.noteZh: 肯尼·麦克莱恩是苏格兰经验丰富的中前卫，能用左脚组织传导、管理比赛节奏，并保持控球衔接。

Kieran Tierney.note: Scotland's left-side defender, giving them overlap timing, back-three cover, and sharp recovery runs when the flank opens.
Kieran Tierney.noteZh: 基兰·蒂尔尼是苏格兰左侧防守者，能把握套边时机、覆盖三中卫体系，并在边路打开时快速回追。

Lawrence Shankland.note: Scotland's penalty-box finisher, useful for first-time shots, near-post runs, and turning half-chances into attempts.
Lawrence Shankland.noteZh: 劳伦斯·尚克兰是苏格兰禁区终结者，能完成第一时间射门、冲击前点，并把半机会转化为射门。

Lewis Ferguson.note: Scotland's timing midfielder, giving them late box arrivals, smart pressing angles, and calm touches between the lines.
Lewis Ferguson.noteZh: 刘易斯·弗格森是苏格兰擅长把握时机的中场，能后插上到禁区、选择聪明压迫角度，并在两线之间冷静处理球。

Liam Kelly.note: Scotland's goalkeeping depth, giving them penalty-save confidence, shot-stopping cover, and a trusted dressing-room presence.
Liam Kelly.noteZh: 利亚姆·凯利是苏格兰门将深度，能提供扑点信心、扑救保护，以及更衣室中值得信任的存在。

Lyndon Dykes.note: Scotland's physical forward, useful for target play, aerial duels, and grinding centre-backs through repeated pressing work.
Lyndon Dykes.noteZh: 林登·戴克斯是苏格兰力量型前锋，能作为支点、争顶对抗，并通过持续压迫消耗中卫。

Nathan Patterson.note: Scotland's pacey right-back, giving them overlap runs, recovery defending, and a direct outlet when the right side opens.
Nathan Patterson.noteZh: 内森·帕特森是苏格兰速度型右后卫，能套边前插、回追防守，并在右路打开时提供直接出口。

Ross Stewart.note: Scotland's tall centre-forward option, useful for aerial targets, penalty-box presence, and direct finishing from crosses.
Ross Stewart.noteZh: 罗斯·斯图尔特是苏格兰高点中锋选择，能作为空中目标、提供禁区存在感，并接传中直接终结。

Ryan Christie.note: Scotland's pressing engine, useful for receiving between lines, chasing second balls, and delivering set pieces with his left foot.
Ryan Christie.noteZh: 瑞安·克里斯蒂是苏格兰压迫发动机，能在两线之间接球、追抢第二落点，并用左脚主罚定位球。

Scott McKenna.note: Scotland's left-footed centre-back, giving them aerial clearances, physical cover, and balance on the left side of defence.
Scott McKenna.noteZh: 斯科特·麦肯纳是苏格兰左脚中卫，能完成空中解围、提供身体保护，并平衡防线左侧。

Scott McTominay.note: Scotland's power midfielder, turning late box runs, long-range shots, and physical duels into their clearest attacking surges.
Scott McTominay.noteZh: 斯科特·麦克托米奈是苏格兰力量型中场，能把后插上、远射和身体对抗转化为最直接的进攻冲击。

Tyler Fletcher.note: Scotland's young midfield option, giving them fresh energy, pressure resistance, and forward passes when legs tire.
Tyler Fletcher.noteZh: 泰勒·弗莱彻是苏格兰年轻中场选择，能在体能下降时带来新鲜活力、抗压能力和向前传球。
